description: This bag from fabindia references authentic Indian style with its materials and design details. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look when you match this to Indian ensembles or pair it with a dress and heels for a great Indo-Western fusion.Dimensions: 12 cm x 28 cmSilk georgette brocade upper with pleatingTwist clasp closureFabric innerPouch insideCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
